name: screenshot-lambda
description: Lambda para captura de pantallas con Playwright

scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd .. && zip -r function.zip node_modules --exclude 'node_modules/typescript/*' 'node_modules/ts-node/*' 'node_modules/@types/*' 'node_modules/playwright/*'
scripts.deploy:local: npm run package && aws lambda create-function --function-name screenshot-processor --runtime nodejs20.x --handler handler.handler --role arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/lambda-role --zip-file fileb://function.zip --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1
scripts.update:local: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name screenshot-processor --zip-file fileb://function.zip --endpoint-url http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1
scripts.package:prod: npm ci --omit=dev && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd .. && zip -r function.zip node_modules && npm install
